releaseNotes: v0.31.0 — Sprint 2: Liberty Stock importer + Stock-vs-Scanned reconciliation. Unblocks the long-deferred CSU unit-counting workflow opened by Michael Bumpus's 2026-05-27 stock-export sample. Two new actions on Reports screen: (1) Import Liberty Stock report — MERGES catalog metadata (drug name, dose, package size) from Liberty into the local products table while PRESERVING RxRescue-only operational settings (PAR levels, active-demand, zone associations, category, manufacturer). Re-importing is a no-op (identity merges skipped). (2) Export Stock vs Scanned reconciliation — per-NDC delta between Liberty Qty In Stock and the sum of active scanned inventory, sorted biggest-discrepancy-first, opens in the OS share sheet as a CSV. PHI-guarded (rejects any header carrying patient-shaped columns). NDC dashed-format → GTIN-14 normalization handles all three FDA HIPAA-padded shapes (4-4-2, 5-3-2, 5-4-1). No schema change. Catalog merges do NOT emit sync ops — peers populate via the existing FDA-lookup path on scan, deliberately simplifying the wire surface. 634 tests passing (+30 vs v0.30.0). Auto-updater rolls v0.30.0 → v0.31.0 on next launch.
